name: manchurian
description: a popular coffee beverage originating from Italy, consisting of one or two shots of espresso combined with a large amount of steamed milk, topped with a thin layer of frothed milk

name: singapuri bhel
description: a chocolate-flavoured variant of caffč latte, commonly served warm or hot in a glass rather than a mug

name: coke
description: an alcoholic beverage produced by fermenting dark-colored grapes with their skins, which provide color, tannins, and flavor.

name: paratha
description: a traditional Cuban punch. The cocktail often consists of five ingredients: white rum, sugar, lime juice, soda water, and mint.
